zh.title: QAnon预言全集 - 匿名者Q的17条预测与验证 | QAnon Predictions
zh.description: QAnon（匿名者Q）是2017年起源于美国匿名论坛的政治阴谋论运动。Q自称政府高层内部人士，发布了数千条帖子（Q drops），包含大量具体预测。本站整理其中17条可验证的核心预言，并进行事实核查。
zh.keywords: QAnon,匿名者Q,Q drops,阴谋论,预言验证,The Storm,大觉醒,深层政府,4chan,8kun
zh.ogTitle: QAnon预言全集 | QAnon Predictions Archive
zh.ogDescription: 匿名者Q（QAnon）的17条核心预测与事实验证。来自4chan/8chan的匿名帖子，绝大多数预测未能应验。
zh.twitterDescription: 17条QAnon核心预测与事实核查。匿名者Q自2017年起在4chan/8chan发布的预言，绝大多数未能应验。

en.title: QAnon Predictions Archive - 17 Claims from Q Drops Fact-Checked | Full Verification
en.description: QAnon originated from anonymous posts on 4chan/8chan by 'Q' starting October 2017. Q claimed to be a high-ranking government insider. This archive compiles 17 verifiable core predictions from Q drops and fact-checks them against reality. The vast majority failed.
en.keywords: QAnon,Q drops,Q predictions,conspiracy theory,The Storm,Great Awakening,deep state,4chan,8kun,fact check
en.ogTitle: QAnon Predictions Archive - Fact-Checked Q Drops
en.ogDescription: 17 verifiable predictions from QAnon's Q drops (2017-2021), fact-checked against reality. The vast majority of specific claims did not materialize.
en.twitterDescription: 17 QAnon predictions fact-checked. Anonymous posts from 4chan/8chan claiming insider knowledge — most predictions failed to materialize.
